scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n shared,api,web -c gray,cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @coolmeals/shared" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build:api:handler: npm run build -w @coolmeals/shared && node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild api/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=api/handler.js --packages=bundle --footer:js="module.exports = module.exports.default || module.exports;"
